title: React Hooks
description: React hooks for declarative SDK integration. Available from both @jambonz/client-sdk-web and @jambonz/client-sdk-react-native.

useJambonzClient.description: Hook that manages JambonzClient lifecycle. Does NOT auto-connect — call connect() explicitly. Does NOT auto-disconnect on unmount — add your own cleanup effect.

parameters.name: options
parameters.description: Client options. IMPORTANT: Must be a stable reference (useMemo) to prevent reconnection loops.

isConnecting.description: True during connecting or reconnecting states

connect.description: Connect and register. Stable across renders.

disconnect.description: Disconnect and clean up. Stable across renders.

useCall.description: Hook that manages a single call's lifecycle. Automatically listens for incoming calls on the client. Resets state after a call ends.

parameters.name: client
parameters.description: The client from useJambonzClient. Pass null before connection.

call.description: Active call instance, or null when idle

isActive.description: True when a call is in progress (not idle/ended)

incomingCaller.description: Remote identity of incoming call, or null

declineIncoming.description: Decline the pending incoming call (sends hangup)
